email_subject: Application for Customer Service Officer – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Officer position at Synergie, as advertised on VDAB. With a strong administrative background and excellent communication skills in English and Turkish, combined with my experience in logistics and client coordination, I am confident I can contribute effectively to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client relationships, coordinate content and project timelines, and ensure accurate data entry and reporting. Previously, at Katoen Natie, I worked in a fast-paced logistics environment where accuracy and efficiency were key. I am proficient in MS Excel and comfortable with administrative tasks, and I thrive in roles that require frequent contact with customers, suppliers, and colleagues.

I am based in Zwijndrecht, flexible with day shifts between 7 and 19u, and eager to take on a varied role. I look forward to discussing how my skills align with your needs.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service Officer position at Synergie. With a strong foundation in administration, logistics, and client communication, I am well-prepared to handle the varied responsibilities of this role.

In my current position as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client accounts, coordinate content schedules, and ensure accurate data entry and reporting. This has honed my organizational skills and ability to communicate clearly with clients and team members. Previously, at Katoen Natie, I worked in a high-volume logistics environment where precision and efficiency were critical. I am proficient in MS Excel and comfortable with administrative tasks such as inputting transport orders and monitoring schedules.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively improving my Dutch (currently A2). I enjoy frequent contact with people and am comfortable communicating with customers, suppliers, and colleagues. I am available for flexible day shifts between 7 and 19u and am eager to contribute to a growing company.

I am drawn to this role because it offers variety and the opportunity to use my organizational and communication skills in a logistics setting. I am a quick learner, detail-oriented, and ready to take on new challenges.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing how I can add value to your team.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO, and strong administrative and organizational skills. At Episto, I manage client accounts, coordinate content and project timelines, and ensure accurate data entry and reporting. My logistics experience at Katoen Natie honed my ability to work accurately in a fast-paced environment. I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. Based in Zwijndrecht, I am flexible with day shifts and eager to take on a varied customer service role.

Core Skills
- Administrative & organizational: data entry, reporting, scheduling, client coordination
- MS Excel: proficient in spreadsheets, data management
- Communication: excellent verbal and written in English and Turkish; Dutch A2 (in progress)
- Customer service: client relationship management, supplier and customer contact
- Logistics: experience in warehouse and logistics environment
- Digital tools: Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, CRM systems (familiar)
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

Experience

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client accounts, coordinate content schedules, and ensure timely delivery of projects
- Perform data entry and reporting for SEO performance metrics
- Communicate regularly with clients to understand needs and provide updates
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress, ensuring accurate content uploads

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Processed orders and ensured correct inventory handling

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

Projects

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site, managing all content and structure
- Implemented structured data and performed technical audits to improve search visibility

Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

References
Available on request.
